race.comment: Tricky two-year-old contest to start the night. THE WILDLING (10) resumes. Held up badly in the straight on debut with a respectable sixth over 1000m in the G3 Gimcrack Stakes at Randwick last October. Returns with the two trials and good enough to overcome the sticky gate. EURIPEDES (1) resumes for his second campaign. Savaged the line on debut with a respectable third over 1100m at Rosehill last November. Given time to mature further and looks ready to go with the two latest trials. Blinkers go on and will prove hard to hold out. EKTIFIRE (13) I Am Invincible filly out of the good producer Ektifaa on debut for the Anthony & Sam Freedman yard. Improved in each of her three trials and maps to get the gun run. AVENGERS (15) Snitzel colt out of the good mare Dream Date on debut for the Anthony & Sam Freedman stable. Impressed in all trials and the blinkers and tongue-tie go on. Stays in the mix.
